asset.title: Review Approve
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough successfully demonstrates the 'Review & Approve' workflow in NodeRoom. It shows the user disabling 'Auto-allow', requesting a reconciliation task, viewing the proposed cell changes directly in the spreadsheet, and accepting them to commit the updates.

featureClarity.evidence: The transition from auto-allow to manual review mode is clearly highlighted by the toggle action and subsequent proposal badges on the spreadsheet.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: The clip captures the entire sequence: disabling auto-allow, submitting the prompt, viewing proposals, and clicking 'Accept all'.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark mode interface is cohesive, though the dense layout and multiple panels make it slightly busy.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, chat agents, and real-time trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live-running web application with realistic financial data.

legibility.evidence: The text and cell values are legible, though the small font size in the trace log requires close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and operations managers who require human-in-the-loop verification before committing AI changes.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the proposal state without pretending the agent can write directly when auto-allow is off.

observedEvidence: Agent proposal badges on spreadsheet cells
Trace log updates reflecting the accepted changes

defects.observed: The proposal badges appear quickly and the transition to 'Accept all' is rapid, which might be hard to follow on first viewing.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the delay or pause on the proposal state before clicking accept.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Enable Review Mode to inspect and approve agent proposals before they are committed to your spreadsheet.
